description: Airflow MCP — list DAGs/runs/task instances, tail logs, trigger and clear (write-gated)
name: io.github.us-all/airflow

environmentVariables.description: Airflow host base, e.g. 'http://airflow.example.com:8080'. Server prepends /api/v2 internally; trailing /api/v1 or /api/v2 is stripped if supplied.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_API_URL

environmentVariables.description: Airflow username (used to mint a JWT via SimpleAuthManager /auth/token).
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_USERNAME

environmentVariables.description: Airflow password (used to mint a JWT via SimpleAuthManager /auth/token).
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_PASSWORD

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable trigger-dag and clear-task tools. Default read-only.
environmentVariables.name: AIRFLOW_ALLOW_WRITE
